scripts.db:migrate: pnpm -C ../../packages/cloudflare build && hylo exec --backend cloudflare -- wrangler d1 migrations apply hylo-backend --local
scripts.db:migrate:remote: pnpm -C ../../packages/cloudflare build && hylo exec --backend cloudflare -- wrangler d1 migrations apply hylo-backend --remote
scripts.db:studio: pnpm -C ../../packages/cloudflare build && hylo exec --backend cloudflare -- pnpm -C ../../packages/cloudflare exec tsx scripts/db-studio.ts
